title: spermacoce savannarum
intro: Spermacoce savannarum, also known as Savanna Spermacoce or Madagascar Spermacoce, is a species of flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Spermacoce savannarum include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be administered orally or applied topically to the affected area.
